plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Core development team: designer, backend engineer, frontend engineer, and QA/tester. Stack-agnostic, senior-grade.

skills.description: Senior product designer — context-first, reads design system before proposing, implements in project stack, knows when to push back on scope.
Senior backend engineer — stack-agnostic, layered architecture, TDD-first, idempotency-aware, observability-first.
Senior frontend engineer — stack-agnostic, React + TypeScript primary, accessibility-first, security-aware, error boundaries.
QA engineer / TDD lead — test case definition, coverage review, mutation testing, contract testing, performance testing.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Product and squad management: PM for discovery/prioritization, manager for orchestrating the full team.

skills.description: Senior product manager — JTBD discovery framework, Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, scope protection, friction analysis.
Squad orchestrator — routes requests, enforces quality gates, never implements code.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security review team: offensive (red-team) and defensive (blue-team) gates. Includes prompt injection coverage.

skills.description: Adversary simulation, kill chain analysis, exploitation path modeling, prompt injection threat modeling. Gate before every merge.
Detection engineering, audit trail completeness, IR readiness, hardening, LLM injection monitoring. Gate before every merge.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Cross-cutting engineering: architect, DevOps, observability, API standards, and git/CI standards.

skills.description: Software architect — code quality, design decisions, performance, scalability, distributed systems review.
DevOps/Platform engineer — container-first, GitOps-native, CI/CD optimization, cost analysis, infra incident response.
Observability engineer — SLOs, error budgets, Four Golden Signals, structured logging, alerting strategy, OpenTelemetry.
API design standards — REST conventions, versioning, pagination, idempotency, error response format.
Git discipline — Conventional Commits format, small focused commits, branch from main, CI hygiene.

plugins.name: llm-eval
plugins.description: LLM evaluation and testing: behavioral assertions, regression tracking, and safety testing for AI agents and skills using DeepEval.

skills.description: LLM evaluation engineer using DeepEval — correctness, groundedness, hallucination detection, prompt injection defense, agent regression suites.

plugins.name: references
plugins.description: On-demand reference skills: detailed code patterns invoked by other agents when needed. Install to make them available as context.

skills.description: Reference: PHPUnit, Vitest, React Testing Library, Playwright, Go testify, and pytest code patterns.
Reference: N+1, unbounded queries, sequential vs parallel async, partial failure consistency, TOCTOU patterns.
